notes: v3.3.0: added an auto-updating skill-phrase data pack. The offline resume engine now converts raw job-description nouns into polished, ATS-safe skill phrases (account to Account management, escalations to Enterprise escalation management, renewals to Renewal management), each still containing the raw keyword so ATS coverage is preserved. A bundled 130+ phrase library ships offline; the app pulls the latest skills-data.json from this channel on launch (offline fallback) and via a new Update skill library now button. Applies to both apps.
